name: S'more Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, beat the butter until smooth. Add sugar and beat on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Blend in egg and vanilla extract. Stir in graham cracker crumbs, flour, and salt.
3. Set aside 2-1/2 cups of the graham cracker mixture. Spread the remaining mixture evenly over the bottom of the prepared pan. Place chocolate bars on top, breaking them to fit if necessary. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly over the chocolate bars in the pan. Top with the reserved graham cracker crumbs.
4. Bake for 30 minutes. Allow to cool for 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack before cutting into bars. Yield: about 24 bars.
